---
title: "MAD345 Mining II(P), Week 01" 
description: "Lecture: Rocks, minerals and mineral inventory evaluation"
date: 2020-10-08T09:00:00-05:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: [mad345_lecturenotes,mad345_lecturenotes_week01]
comments: false
---


```{r , echo=FALSE}
library(kableExtra)
text_tbl <- data.frame(
Date=c("October 7","October 8"),
Topic=c("[Introduction](/posts/071020_post01_mad345t/index.html)",
        "Rocks, minerals and mineral inventory evaluation (Lecture slides [link](/upload/mad345p_w01_oct8.pdf))")
)

kbl(text_tbl,escape = F) %>%
    kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = T)%>%
  column_spec(1, width = "8em")%>%
    column_spec(2, width = "40em")%>%
  row_spec(2, background = "orange", color="black", bold = TRUE)%>%
  row_spec(1, color="lightgrey")

```

Dear all,

Today's topic is an introductory for this terms MAD345 Mining II (Underground Part). We have covered Prospecting, Exploration & Site Investigations in mining. Also, resource and reserve estimation and qualified person definitions are given. 

For further reading: "Chapter 3. Prospecting, exploration & site investigations", Ratan Tatiya, “Surface and Underground Excavations: Methods, Techniques and Equipment”.

Here are some useful links for you: 

1. [Madencilik Türkiye](https://madencilikturkiye.com/) 
2. [UMREK](http://www.umrek.com.tr/index.php)

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("hammer_and_pick")`
